description_long: This is a robust, industrial-style desk lamp with a heavy, circular base that appears to be made of textured black metal or rubber for stability. The lamp features a segmented, articulated arm with visible joints and a flexible metallic conduit, allowing for adjustable positioning. The lamp head is cylindrical, constructed from dark metal, and is proportionally large compared to the arm, suggesting a focus on durability and function. A visible power cord with a two-prong plug extends from the base, emphasizing its plug-in electric design. The base includes a metallic accent or emblem, adding a subtle decorative touch. The overall aesthetic is utilitarian, with exposed mechanical elements and a matte, slightly worn finish.
description: A heavy-duty, industrial desk lamp with a large cylindrical metal head, articulated arm, and a sturdy round base. Features a visible power cord and a rugged, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the articulated arm, large cylindrical lamp head, and the round, textured base with a visible metallic accent.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the flexible metallic conduit along the arm, the back of the lamp head, and the extended power cord with plug.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the articulated arm, the plug resting on the ground, and the lamp head's cylindrical shape.
description_view_3: Direct back view focusing on the rear of the lamp head, the central mounting of the arm, and the circular base with the cord trailing behind.
